summary: Promoted ADR 0297 into canonical mainline truth as repository version `0.177.112` and platform version `0.130.74` after replaying the exact-main private Gitea snapshot derived from source commit `88288bbeee5baf4baa0db81b8b7a79bb2c5ba13a`. The private mainline `validate.yml` and `renovate.yml` workflows both concluded `success`, and the Renovate replay kept the dashboard plus governed update-PR creation path live on the exact source tree that settled the workflow contract. Two shared follow-ups remain outside ADR 0297's success boundary: `release-bundle.yml` on private `main` failed asset upload because Gitea attachments storage returned `no space left on device`, and one stale pre-existing Renovate PR-sync validation run still saw an incomplete checkout workspace after the refreshed mainline replay.

verification.observed: The repaired source tree was published onto the private Gitea `main` snapshot by creating snapshot commit `a10101240780d755f27988ee7352ac4f7cc74a7c` on top of the prior private-main head and pushing it fast-forward, preserving an exact private-repo copy of the settled `88288bbeee5baf4baa0db81b8b7a79bb2c5ba13a` source tree for hosted verification.
Private Gitea `validate.yml` run `169` / job `224` concluded `success` on `main` after the exact-main snapshot publication.
Private Gitea `renovate.yml` run `170` / job `225` concluded `success` on `main`, preserved the `Renovate Dashboard`, and kept the governed update PRs live against the private repo.

verification.check: Released-tree repo automation and validation bundle
verification.observed: The integrated `0.177.112 / 0.130.74` tree passed the direct validation bundle: targeted Renovate/Gitea pytest (`23 passed in 0.81s`), `scripts/validate_renovate_contract.py`, `renovate-config-validator`, `scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, and `git diff --check`. `make remote-validate` then passed every selected lane except the intentional terminal-branch `workstream-surfaces` guard, and `make pre-push-gate` showed the same remote result while the local fallback additionally timed out `ansible-lint` after `600` seconds.

verification.check: Shared follow-up visibility outside ADR 0297's success boundary
verification.observed: Private Gitea `release-bundle.yml` run `168` failed because `Attachments.Save` hit `no space left on device`, and a refreshed PR-sync validation run (`validate.yml` run `171` / job `226`) still saw `/workspace/scripts/...` missing on one stale existing Renovate PR branch even though the mainline checkout/runtime fix itself was already present.

notes: ADR 0297 is now recorded as implemented in repository version `0.177.112` and first verified live in platform version `0.130.74`.

The exact-main hosted success boundary for this ADR is the private Gitea `main` validate and Renovate replay; the attachment-capacity failure and stale PR-branch validation defect are preserved here as shared follow-up work rather than as blockers to the ADR's first verified platform version.

The remaining repo-wrapper failures on this workstream branch are governance-shape outcomes, not ADR 0297 regressions: `workstream-surfaces` intentionally rejects a terminal workstream branch, and the local `pre-push-gate` fallback hit an `ansible-lint` timeout after the remote leg had already passed that lane.
